祖鲁语

正在获取翻译…

原文

*** I am travelling to Suffolk Thu/17/07/254 > Fri/18/07/25 I have a new home made whip that needs testing - preferred outdoors so that it swings *** Update August 2022 *** Anyone into Roman CRUCIFIXION? *** Currently looking for discrete outdoor (night time) whipping. Does anyone know of any suitable outdoor locations (Thetford forest?) or a derelict/abandoned building where I can get tied up and whipped, without the public hearing and seeing? *** † *** Also looking for very heavy indoor whipping whilst securely restrained. Ideally by 2 (or more) sadists, so one can film, or take turns. *** † *** ********************************** About me --------------------------------------------------- I am able to travel. http://bdsmtest.org/result.php?id=2129373 6'2" (187cm), 33" waist, 82kg, black hair & brown eyes, HIV negative. Looking for Oriental Masters, Dominant Black Masters, Eastern European Masters or SS Masters into racial play. However any Master with a dominant/sadistic mindset is also fine. Into harsh/extreme punishment, Discipline4Boys, RussianBoys movies style. NOT for faint hearted Masters. Looking for the following: ********************************** Short Sessions (A few hours / overnight) --------------------------------------------------- MICE INFESTED CELLAR Anyone with a basement/cellar overridden with mice. Would love to spend the night there, left in the dark whilst tied up for a few hours. PARTIAL BURIAL Anyone with a garden/field that is private & secluded. Buried naked up to my waist/stomach, with hands restrained behind me (or above) and blindfolded. Left for a few hours. SUSPENSION Looking for suspension bondage, tied in a X configuration. EXTREME PUNISHMENT Do you know how to use a whip/cane/strap so that each stroke cuts? Want to try? CRUCIFIXION Indoors or outdoors and watch me suffer? SHORT OUTDOOR SESSION Collected from the road by car/van/vehicle and taken to a quiet and deserted area. All my clothes including shoes are left in your vehicle. You take me for a walk through the rough ground for about 1 hour with me handcuffed and ankles shackled (cold and wet weather is fine). Stopping every 20 minutes for me to receive bastinado. After 1h of hiking, being tied to a tree and severely whipped. Once the punishment is complete we hike back to your vehicle (again stopping every 20 minutes for bastinado). I then get dressed and you can return me back to within 2 miles of where you collected me and I make my own way home. ********************************** Medium Sessions (A few days) --------------------------------------------------- CONSTRUCTION PROJECT Anyone has wood and tools? Would like to come to yours and have to build a piece of equipment that will be used for my own punishment LABOURING Genuine (unpaid) manual work on a farm, building site, chain-gang, etc TOILET SERVICE Can be your personal/group toilet. MEDIUM TERM SESSION Interested in being imprisoned for a fixed sentence of a few days. Damp, with no bed, no toilet and completely naked. Held in complete darkness and kept chained. No toilet facilities, so have to use the floor. Food will be a privilege and given a maximum of once a day. It will be served in darkness and thrown into the cell. Water will be given twice a day only. The prisoner will not be taken out of the cell. Punishment to be administered a minimum of daily. The jailor may wish to make the prisoner available for use by visiting torturers as he sees fit. ********************************** Permanent Sessions (No Return) --------------------------------------------------- PERMANENT SLAVERY Looking to be owned as a slave on a permanent lifetime contract. Fully owned as a possession to work on your land or home (similar to slaves of the 17th / 18th century). ********************************** Limits --------------------------------------------------- Short and medium sessions: No long lasting marks (i.e. not lasting more than a few weeks)
*** I am travelling to Suffolk Thu/17/07/254 > Fri/18/07/25 I have a new home made whip that needs testing - preferred outdoors so that it swings *** Update August 2022 *** Anyone into Roman CRUCIFIXION? *** Currently looking for discrete outdoor (night time) whipping. Does anyone know of any suitable outdoor locations (Thetford forest?) or a derelict/abandoned building where I can get tied up and whipped, without the public hearing and seeing? *** † *** Also looking for very heavy indoor whipping whilst securely restrained. Ideally by 2 (or more) sadists, so one can film, or take turns. *** † *** ********************************** About me --------------------------------------------------- I am able to travel. http://bdsmtest.org/result.php?id=2129373 6'2" (187cm), 33" waist, 82kg, black hair & brown eyes, HIV negative. Looking for Oriental Masters, Dominant Black Masters, Eastern European Masters or SS Masters into racial play. However any Master with a dominant/sadistic mindset is also fine. Into harsh/extreme punishment, Discipline4Boys, RussianBoys movies style. NOT for faint hearted Masters. Looking for the following: ********************************** Short Sessions (A few hours / overnight) --------------------------------------------------- MICE INFESTED CELLAR Anyone with a basement/cellar overridden with mice. Would love to spend the night there, left in the dark whilst tied up for a few hours. PARTIAL BURIAL Anyone with a garden/field that is private & secluded. Buried naked up to my waist/stomach, with hands restrained behind me (or above) and blindfolded. Left for a few hours. SUSPENSION Looking for suspension bondage, tied in a X configuration. EXTREME PUNISHMENT Do you know how to use a whip/cane/strap so that each stroke cuts? Want to try? CRUCIFIXION Indoors or outdoors and watch me suffer? SHORT OUTDOOR SESSION Collected from the road by car/van/vehicle and taken to a quiet and deserted area. All my clothes including shoes are left in your vehicle. You take me for a walk through the rough ground for about 1 hour with me handcuffed and ankles shackled (cold and wet weather is fine). Stopping every 20 minutes for me to receive bastinado. After 1h of hiking, being tied to a tree and severely whipped. Once the punishment is complete we hike back to your vehicle (again stopping every 20 minutes for bastinado). I then get dressed and you can return me back to within 2 miles of where you collected me and I make my own way home. ********************************** Medium Sessions (A few days) --------------------------------------------------- CONSTRUCTION PROJECT Anyone has wood and tools? Would like to come to yours and have to build a piece of equipment that will be used for my own punishment LABOURING Genuine (unpaid) manual work on a farm, building site, chain-gang, etc TOILET SERVICE Can be your personal/group toilet. MEDIUM TERM SESSION Interested in being imprisoned for a fixed sentence of a few days. Damp, with no bed, no toilet and completely naked. Held in complete darkness and kept chained. No toilet facilities, so have to use the floor. Food will be a privilege and given a maximum of once a day. It will be served in darkness and thrown into the cell. Water will be given twice a day only. The prisoner will not be taken out of the cell. Punishment to be administered a minimum of daily. The jailor may wish to make the prisoner available for use by visiting torturers as he sees fit. ********************************** Permanent Sessions (No Return) --------------------------------------------------- PERMANENT SLAVERY Looking to be owned as a slave on a permanent lifetime contract. Fully owned as a possession to work on your land or home (similar to slaves of the 17th / 18th century). ********************************** Limits --------------------------------------------------- Short and medium sessions: No long lasting marks (i.e. not lasting more than a few weeks)
